name: client-communication-drafting
description: Draft professional client-facing communications: status updates, milestone reports, delay notifications, and meeting summaries
objectives: Draft clear, professional status updates for clients
Communicate delays or blockers with context and resolution plans
Summarize milestone completions with deliverable highlights
Include next steps and expected dates
Adapt communication style to client relationship
prerequisites: Project status data available (tasks, milestones, timeline)
Client contact and communication history accessible

procedure.description: Collect all relevant project data for the communication
commands: QUERY project progress: completed, in-progress, upcoming tasks
CHECK for blockers, delays, or risks to communicate
REVIEW last client communication for continuity
IDENTIFY achievements and milestones reached
NOTE any decisions needed from client
procedure.expectedOutput: Communication context package with all relevant data

commands: CLASSIFY communication type: status update, milestone report, delay notice, meeting summary, scope change request
SELECT appropriate template and tone
DETERMINE urgency level (routine, important, urgent)
IDENTIFY audience (primary client contact, stakeholder group, executive)
WRITE opening with greeting and purpose
INCLUDE progress summary with key metrics
ADDRESS any issues with context and resolution plan
LIST next steps with owners and expected dates
ADD closing with availability for questions
KEEP concise: status updates <300 words, reports <500 words
procedure.expectedOutput: Draft communication ready for PM review

procedure.description: Review draft for tone, accuracy, and completeness
commands: VERIFY all facts and dates are accurate
CHECK tone is appropriate for the situation
ENSURE no internal jargon or sensitive details leaked
ADD formatting for readability (bullet points, headers)
FLAG sections needing PM input before sending
procedure.expectedOutput: Polished communication draft with review notes

criteria: Tone matches the situation (positive for milestones, honest for delays)
Length is appropriate for communication type

testScenarios.test: Generate status update for a project on track
testScenarios.expected: Concise update highlighting progress and next steps
Honest explanation with root cause, impact, and recovery plan

successIndicators: PM approves draft with minimal edits
No follow-up questions about missing information

commonErrors.error: Insufficient project data for meaningful update
commonErrors.solution: Generate partial draft, flag gaps for PM to fill
Present both perspectives, let PM choose framing

escalationCriteria: Communication involves contract disputes or legal issues
Client relationship at risk due to severe delays

successMetrics.name: Draft Approval Rate
successMetrics.measurement: Drafts approved by PM with <3 edits

successMetrics.name: Communication Timeliness
successMetrics.measurement: Draft generated within hours of trigger event

agentInterfaces.message: Fetch project status data for client communication
